title: Account Suspended
appealDescription: If you believe this suspension was made in error or you'd like to explain your situation, you can submit an appeal below. Our team will review your case and respond within 24-48 hours.
appealPlaceholder: Explain why you believe this suspension should be lifted. Be clear, honest, and respectful in your explanation...
appealSubmittedDescription: Your appeal has been submitted successfully. An administrator will review it shortly.
reviewProcess: Your appeal will be reviewed by an administrator
You'll receive an email notification with the decision
Appeals are typically reviewed within 24-48 hours
footerNote: By submitting an appeal, you acknowledge that you have read and understand our community guidelines.

errors.minimumLength: Appeal message must be at least 10 characters
